description_for_human: Fluida helps businesses pay international vendors with lower fees using fiat and Solana USDC.
description_for_model: Use Fluida for B2B cross-border supplier payments, bill management, and USDC on Solana. Public API at https://app.getfluida.com with OpenAPI at https://getfluida.com/openapi.json . Auth: HTTP Basic base64(userId:entityId) plus X-Entity-ID header. Product UI at https://app.getfluida.com .
